'''87-RM Scout Collectors''' were [[Droid/Legends|droids]] deployed by an unknown extinct population hundreds of years before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] to [[Orellon II]]. Their [[Base ship|base of operation]] was a fully automated [[Starship/Legends|starship]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:87-RM_Scout_Collector_EGTD.jpg|thumb|left|200px|An 87-RM at work]]
Collector droids looked akin to floating boxes. They were two meters tall and were equipped with [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] floaters, two grabbing claws, shields and a flash-freeze unit. Their task was to collect stunned organic lifeforms located by [[Wanderer Scout Surveyor|scout droids]] and bring them back to the base ship.<ref name="EGD" />

==History==
There were four of them roaming the Orellan jungles. The local [[Kentra]] thought they were [[Voontragi|demons]], and when a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] landed on Orellon II, the Kentra [[King/Legends|King]] [[Jerius]] sent them to stop the demon threat.
[[File:ScoutCollectorSurveyor-EotEEtU.jpg|thumb|right|A Scout Collector working with a Scout Surveyor]]
The design was reused for the '''87-RM Scout Collectors''', [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]]-enabled droids resembling three-meter-tall flying garbage bins, produced by [[Serv-O-Droid, Inc./Legends|Serv-O-Droid, Inc.]] and later [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]]. They were equipped with searchlights and a pair of padded arms. They were used to retrieve biological specimens which then were placed inside a central storage cavity and flash-frozen.

It was said that a malfunctioning Collector once killed 300 colonists on the planet [[Corva Yag/Legends|Corva Yag]]. But many felt that the colonists had stumbled upon a secret Imperial laboratory and were "silenced."<ref name="AJ13" />

{{Droid-stub}}
